productDisplayName: Fila Men's Illusion White Black Shoe
description: With a soft footbed and a lace-up front, the Illusion shoes from fila are designed to support your exercise regime to the hilt.Upper Synthetic upper with lace-up front for snug Fit Padded mesh tongue for soft feel Brand name embossed on a metallic case outside  the heel cup Midsole Lightweight EVA midsole for extra shock absorption Soft footbed for an ergonomic fit Separate air chamber between the heel cup and the heel for greater traction Outsole Carbon rubber outsole with multiple patterns for great grip Flex grooves for good traction shoe careDo not machine washWipe with damp, clean cloth to remove dustStore away from sunlight
